targets.boundary: Global data centers and office campuses
targets.notes: Target focuses on achieving 24/7 carbon-free electricity supply for operations by 2030 rather than an explicit GHG reduction percentage.
targets.title: 24/7 carbon-free energy for operations by 2030

targets.notes: Google claims to have maintained carbon-neutral operations every year since 2007 through efficiency, renewable energy procurement, and carbon offsets.
targets.title: Carbon-neutral operations (Scope 1 and 2) maintained since 2007

targets.boundary: Global operations (purchased electricity for data centers and offices)
targets.notes: Since 2017 Google has matched 100% of its annual electricity consumption with purchases of renewable energy for its operations.
targets.title: 100% annual renewable electricity matching for operations
